task: Phase 6 quality review for 18-file authentication overhaul across auth/, middleware/, tests/

partitioning_strategy.reviewer_1: correctness and security — auth/ (7 files) + middleware/ (6 files)
partitioning_strategy.reviewer_3: test quality and coverage — tests/ (5 files) + auth/ + middleware/ for coverage verification

parallelism.analysis_phase: all 4 agents run in parallel (read-only, no conflicts)
parallelism.fix_phase: sequential by directory (auth/ → middleware/ → tests/), simplifier changes applied before reviewer changes

conflict_prevention_mechanisms: All agents are read-only during analysis — no write conflicts possible
Fix application sequenced by directory to avoid overlapping edits
Simplifier refactors applied before reviewer fixes
Single consolidated prioritized list before any edits are made
High-severity correctness fixes applied before style/convention fixes
